mapper.select: SELECT s.PBLANC_SN AS id, COALESCE(p.PBLANC_NM, s.PBLANC_NM) AS title, CONCAT_WS(' · ', i.INSTT_NM, NULLIF(p.EMPLYM_STLE, ''), NULLIF(p.ADRES, '')) AS meta, DATE_FORMAT(s.RGSDE, '%Y.%m.%d') AS `date`, COALESCE(t.is_target, 0) AS isTarget FROM TN_INDVDL_PBLANC_SCRAP s LEFT JOIN TN_EMPMN_PBLANC p ON p.PBLANC_SN = s.PBLANC_SN LEFT JOIN TN_INSTT_INFO i ON i.USER_SN = s.INSTT_USER_SN LEFT JOIN sys_user_job_scrap t ON t.indvdl_user_sn = s.INDVDL_USER_SN AND t.instt_user_sn = s.INSTT_USER_SN AND t.pblanc_sn = s.PBLANC_SN WHERE s.INDVDL_USER_SN = #{userSn} ORDER BY s.RGSDE DESC, s.PBLANC_SN
SELECT CASE WHEN sido IN ('전국', '해외') THEN sido ELSE CONCAT(sido, ' ', COALESCE(sigungu, '전체')) END FROM sys_user_desired_region WHERE user_id = #{userSn} ORDER BY region_id
SELECT ct.name FROM sys_user_profile p JOIN sys_common_type ct ON ct.group_code = 'INDUSTRY' AND ct.code = CAST(p.desired_industry_code AS CHAR) WHERE p.user_id = #{userSn}
SELECT ct.name FROM sys_user_profile p JOIN sys_common_type ct ON ct.group_code = 'JOB' AND ct.code = CAST(p.desired_job_code AS CHAR) WHERE p.user_id = #{userSn}
SELECT ct.name FROM sys_user_type ut JOIN sys_common_type ct ON ct.common_id = ut.type_id WHERE ut.user_id = #{userSn} AND ct.group_code = 'EMPLOYMENT_TYPE' ORDER BY ut.common_id
SELECT content FROM sys_user_concern WHERE user_id = #{userSn} AND content IS NOT NULL AND content <> '' ORDER BY concern_id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TN_INDVDL_PBLANC_SCRAP WHERE INDVDL_USER_SN = #{userSn}
